name: Nutty Quinoa Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the quinoa and water in a large saucepan, and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes. Then add the raisins and continue cooking until all the liquid has evaporated, about 5 minutes. Remove the pan from the heat and spread the mixture out on a baking sheet. Let it cool completely.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooled quinoa and raisins with all the remaining ingredients. Toss gently and serve.
